code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut nums = [0, 0]
  mut count = 0
  mut i = 0
  mut cur = 0
  mut sign = 1
  mut in_num = false
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    let is_digit = b >= 48 and b <= 57
    let is_minus = b == 45
    let is_plus = b == 43
    if is_digit
      if not in_num
        cur = 0
        sign = 1
        in_num = true
      end
      cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
    else if is_minus and not in_num
      sign = -1
      in_num = true
      cur = 0
    else if is_plus and not in_num
      sign = 1
      in_num = true
      cur = 0
    else
      if in_num
        if count == 0
          nums = [cur * sign, 0]
        else if count == 1
          nums = [nums[0], cur * sign]
        end
        count = count + 1
        in_num = false
        cur = 0
        sign = 1
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if in_num
    if count == 0
      nums = [cur * sign, 0]
    else if count == 1
      nums = [nums[0], cur * sign]
    end
    count = count + 1
  end
  let a = nums[0]
  let b = nums[1]
  let r = a * a + b * b
  println("r=#{r}")
end
